ADMIN.TITLE: Admin Panel - User Management
ADMIN.NAME: Name
ADMIN.DELETE_CONFIRM: Are you sure you want to delete this user? This action cannot be undone.

LOGIN.TITLE: Login
LOGIN.SUBTITLE: Use your company credentials to access the dashboards.
LOGIN.OTP_HINT: Open Google Authenticator and enter the 6-digit code.
LOGIN.STATUS_IDLE: Enter your email then open camera
LOGIN.STATUS_READY: ✅ Ready — click Capture when in frame
LOGIN.STATUS_NO_FACE: No face detected — move closer and retry

SIGNUP.TITLE: Create Account
SIGNUP.SUBTITLE: Choose role, set credentials, and (for owners) define company defaults.
SIGNUP.NAME: Full Name
SIGNUP.ID_HINT: Ask the owner for the company ID (see their /company/config response).

ERRORS.NAME_MIN: Name must be at least 2 characters.
ERRORS.NAME_ALPHA: Name must contain at least one letter.
ERRORS.PASS_MIN: Password must be at least 8 characters.

SALES.SUBTITLE: Monitor revenue, customers, and sales performance
SALES.AI_SUBTITLE: AI classification of product performance based on sales trends

PURCHASES.SUBTITLE: Track your purchases, suppliers, and spending analytics
PURCHASES.ALERTS_SUBTITLE: AI-powered stockout risk prediction based on your purchase & sales history
PURCHASES.NO_RISKS: No stockout risks detected. Your inventory levels look healthy!
PURCHASES.UPLOAD_HINT: Upload a CSV file or add purchases manually to see your dashboard come to life.

REPORT.SUBTITLE: Company financial overview, AI health assessment & revenue forecast
REPORT.FORECAST_SUBTITLE: Linear regression model predicting next 7 days of revenue
REPORT.UPLOAD_HINT: Upload sales and purchase data to generate your financial report and AI insights.

ASSISTANT.TITLE: Business Assistant
ASSISTANT.SUBTITLE: Generate a full business summary and send it by email.
ASSISTANT.FAILED: Failed to send email. Check SMTP configuration.

SETTINGS.TITLE: Settings
SETTINGS.ACCOUNT_DESC: Manage your profile, photo, and company details.
SETTINGS.NAME: Name
SETTINGS.TWO_FACTOR_DESC: Require a code from Google Authenticator on each login.
SETTINGS.QR_INSTRUCTIONS_1: 1. Open Google Authenticator on your phone.
SETTINGS.QR_INSTRUCTIONS_2: 2. Tap + then Scan a QR code.
SETTINGS.CANT_SCAN: Can't scan? Enter this key manually:
SETTINGS.CONFIRM_DESC: Enter the 6-digit code from Google Authenticator to confirm setup:
SETTINGS.2FA_ACTIVE_SUCCESS: 2FA is now active. You'll be asked for a code on your next login.
SETTINGS.CONFIRM_DISABLE_DESC: Enter your current 6-digit code to confirm disabling 2FA:
SETTINGS.FACE_REC_DESC: Enroll or verify your face for quick passwordless login.

FACE_VERIFY.TITLE: Face Recognition
FACE_VERIFY.VERIFY_HINT: Verify your identity with your face, or skip to go straight to the dashboard.
FACE_VERIFY.ENROLL_HINT: Enroll your face for quick face login. You can update it anytime.
FACE_VERIFY.CAMERA_OVERLAY: Look directly at the camera and stay still
FACE_VERIFY.STATUS_CAMERA: 🎥 Position your face in frame then capture
FACE_VERIFY.STATUS_NO_FACE: 😕 No face detected — move closer and retry
FACE_VERIFY.STATUS_NO_ENROLLED: ℹ️ No face enrolled yet — switch to the Enroll tab to register your face
FACE_VERIFY.STATUS_ENROLLED: ✅ Face enrolled successfully! You can now use face login.
FACE_VERIFY.ERR_CAM_ACCESS: Camera access denied — please allow camera permission.
FACE_VERIFY.ERR_VERIFY_FAIL: Verification failed. Try again or skip.
FACE_VERIFY.ERR_SAVE_FAIL: Failed to save face. Try again.

SALES.EXP_TOP: Highest revenue product with {{rev}} total sales.
SALES.EXP_RISING: Strong growth of {{growth}}%. Revenue increased significantly in recent period.
SALES.EXP_DECLINING: Revenue dropped by {{drop}}%. Needs attention or promotion.
SALES.EXP_LOW: Only {{orders}} orders totaling {{rev}}. Consider bundling or promotions.

PURCHASES.EXP_URGENT: Stock critically low. At current sales rate of {{rate}} units/day, stock will run out in ~{{days}} days. Order {{qty}} units immediately.
PURCHASES.EXP_SOON: Stock getting low. At current sales rate of {{rate}} units/day, consider ordering {{qty}} units within the next week.
